strategy: He steals all your charms when you cast a blade (and occasionally on his own), so blade and hit the same round, or protect with Aegis.
Feint is double-Cleansed and Indemnity won't save it — trap him with regular traps or rely on blades timed with the hit instead.
At the start of every 3rd round he Dimension Shifts the traps hanging on him onto a random target, so don't over-invest in traps on him before round 3, 6, or 9.
Round 5 he summons Chilling/Stormy Helpers and resummons any defeated minion after a round — AoE to clear them with him.
Blade up and finish Krampus (3,920) with one AoE before the minion cycle drags on.
cheatNotes: Late wizards get an enhanced Power Link — join on time.
Cast a blade and he may Steal Charm all your charms — hit the same round or protect with Aegis.
He also throws this steal out occasionally on his own.
Pet-cast blades can trigger the steal too.
Cast Feint and he Cleanse Wards twice, and Indemnity won't protect it — don't rely on Feint here.
Every 3rd round he Dimension Shifts the traps on him to a random friend or foe, so traps on him may vanish or move.
Round 5 he summons Chilling and Stormy Helpers.
Any defeated minion is resummoned one round later — AoE everything together.
